elements.name: Fix approved
elements.documentation: The operator authorized the causal correction after the empty-workspace diagnosis.

elements.name: Extend shared pane mover
elements.documentation: Add a fail-fast workspace-adoption mode to qq-herdr-pull while preserving the existing detached operator modes and their notification behavior.

elements.name: Adopt helper in delivery workflow
elements.documentation: Teach deliver-change to invoke the shared mover for the returned workspace and anchor all subsequent work to its checkout; document both caller modes.

elements.name: Enter verification
elements.documentation: Initial implementation and every correction converge on the same focused verification pass.

elements.name: Validate Skill and handoff invariants
elements.documentation: Validate both caller modes with mocks, Skill structure, diff hygiene, move-before-close ordering, checkout anchoring, and the live accountable-pane topology.

elements.name: Checks green?
elements.documentation: Only a fresh passing observation of the intended handoff may advance to review.

elements.name: Enter correction
elements.documentation: Failed Checks and verified review findings converge on one bounded correction path.

elements.name: Correct in-scope failure
elements.documentation: Apply the smallest correction for a failed check or confirmed review finding, then rerun the focused checks.

elements.name: Run fresh-context review
elements.documentation: Give one read-only reviewer the complete intent, exact delta, and passing Check evidence before publication.

elements.name: Review clear?
elements.documentation: Advance only when no verified material finding remains in the Change.

elements.name: Publish green pull request
elements.documentation: Commit and push the reviewed Change, open its pull request, and require applicable GitHub Checks to pass.

elements.name: Green PR ready
elements.documentation: The reviewed fix is green in its owning pull request and ready for operator handoff.
